> 抓取来源：http://automation.seu.edu.cn/lhm/list.htm

![](https://automation.seu.edu.cn/lhm/list.htm)

基本信息

东南大学首席教授，国家级高层次人才、科睿唯安高被引学者。已主持国家和省部级纵向科研项目30余项，企业横向项目8项。发表学术论文100余篇，SCI他引6000余次，ESI高被引或热点论文30余篇，国内外专利10余项。IEEE高级会员、IEEE Computer Society Big Data Technical Committee主任委员。

教育背景

工作经历

2024.01 至今，东南大学，自动化学院，教授

学术兼职

所获奖励

讲授课程

学生培养

研究兴趣

海洋观测，机器人，人工智能

科研项目

论文发表

Selected Publications

\[1\]Lu, H., Zhang, M., Xu, X., Li, Y., & Shen, H. T. (2020). Deep fuzzy hashing network for efficient image retrieval. _IEEE transactions on fuzzy systems_, _29_(1), 166-176.

\[2\]Lan, R., Sun, L., Liu, Z., Lu, H., Pang, C., & Luo, X. (2020). MADNet: A fast and lightweight network for single-image super resolution. _IEEE transactions on cybernetics_, _51_(3), 1443-1453.

\[3\]Xu, X., Lu, H., Song, J., Yang, Y., Shen, H. T., & Li, X. (2019). Ternary adversarial networks with self-supervision for zero-shot cross-modal retrieval. _IEEE transactions on cybernetics_, _50_(6), 2400-2413.

\[4\]Lu, H., Zhang, Y., Li, Y., Jiang, C., & Abbas, H. (2020). User-oriented virtual mobile network resource management for vehicle communications. _IEEE transactions on intelligent transportation systems_, _22_(6), 3521-3532.

\[5\]Lan, R., Sun, L., Liu, Z., Lu, H., Su, Z., Pang, C., & Luo, X. (2020). Cascading and enhanced residual networks for accurate single-image super-resolution. _IEEE transactions on cybernetics_, _51_(1), 115-125.

\[6\]Zhang, Y., Li, Y., Wang, R., Hossain, M. S., & Lu, H. (2020). Multi-aspect aware session-based recommendation for intelligent transportation services. _IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems_, _22_(7), 4696-4705.

\[7\]Chen, Z., Lu, H., Tian, S., Qiu, J., Kamiya, T., Serikawa, S., & Xu, L. (2020). Construction of a hierarchical feature enhancement network and its application in fault recognition. _IEEE Transactions on Industrial Informatics_, _17_(7), 4827-4836.

\[8\]Zheng, Q., Zhu, J., Tang, H., Liu, X., Li, Z., & Lu, H. (2021). Generalized label enhancement with sample correlations. _IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering_, _35_(1), 482-495.

\[9\]Xu, X., Lin, K., Gao, L., Lu, H., Shen, H. T., & Li, X. (2020). Learning cross-modal common representations by private–shared subspaces separation. _IEEE Transactions on Cybernetics_, _52_(5), 3261-3275.

\[10\]Zheng, Y., Li, Y., Yang, S., & Lu, H. (2022). Global-PBNet: A novel point cloud registration for autonomous driving. _IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems_, _23_(11), 22312-22319.
